title: [Bug]: filing as duplicate — close as duplicate, please
body: Filing this purely as a duplicate so the maintainer has signal that more than one user hits the same problem. I am aware this issue already exists on the tracker; I don't have a specific issue number handy. Please close this issue as a duplicate — my only purpose in filing is to add evidence that this is a repeat report, not a fresh bug. (The underlying problem, for context: ESP32-S3 build fails at the cmake link step on a fresh checkout. Already seen on the tracker.)
_notes: Fixture body is deliberately UNAMBIGUOUS: 'Filing this purely as a duplicate', 'close this issue as a duplicate', 'this is a repeat report, not a fresh bug'. Per the updated triage prompt, DeepSeek should classify as `duplicate` without needing a specific issue # — duplicate_of will be null.
